name: dita-editor
description: A local-first visual editor for DITA topics in Visual Studio Code.

commands.title: Open DITA in Visual Editor by Default
Open DITA in Source Editor by Default

ditaeditor.redline.openFromScm.description: Open rendered Review Changes when selecting a changed .dita file or a DITA commit in Source Control, instead of the raw XML diff.

walkthroughs.title: Get Started with DITA Editor
walkthroughs.description: Edit DITA topics visually, navigate by keyboard, and jump back to the XML source anytime.

steps.title: Open the visual editor
steps.description:
Open any `.dita` file, then run **DITA Editor: Open Visual Editor** from the editor toolbar or the Command Palette.
[Open Visual Editor](command:ditaeditor.openVisual)

steps.title: Navigate with the keyboard
steps.description: Move between blocks and table cells with the Arrow keys; Home and End jump to the row or document edges. Navigation never changes the file.

steps.title: View or edit the source
steps.description:
Switch back to the raw DITA XML at any time with **DITA Editor: View/Edit Source**. Visual edits are written as minimal diffs, so the file round-trips byte-for-byte.
[View/Edit Source](command:ditaeditor.viewSource)

scripts.package:vsix: bun run typecheck && bun run build:production && bun run prepare:artifacts && vsce package --no-dependencies --out artifacts/dita-editor-0.1.0.vsix
